title: Building a Load Balancer in Rust
description: A series of posts about building a load balancer in Rust, covering topics such as async programming, networking, and performance optimization.
descriptionLong: In this series, I document my journey of building a load balancer in Rust. It covers various topics such as async programming, networking, and performance optimization. The goal of this series is to share my learning process and the challenges I encounter along the way, while also providing insights and solutions for others who might be interested in similar projects.
